svg.text: RUNTIME — file lands on S3 → partition queryable in Athena

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What format must files be in when landing on S3 for partitions to work?')
sendPrompt('How does S3 store partitioned files in Hive format?')
sendPrompt('How does the S3 event notification trigger the Lambda?')
sendPrompt('How does EventBridge trigger the Lambda on a schedule?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda function actually execute to refresh partitions?')
sendPrompt('What Athena query does the Lambda run and how long does it take?')
sendPrompt('How does Athena scan S3 to find new partition folders?')
sendPrompt('What gets written to the Glue catalog when a new partition is found?')
sendPrompt('How quickly can I query new data in Athena after a file lands on S3?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch log for each Lambda execution?')

svg.text: Path 1 (event): pipeline → S3 → S3 notification → Lambda → Athena → Glue catalog
Path 2 (schedule): EventBridge cron → Lambda → Athena → Glue catalog
